description: First completed Open Targets/ClinPGx review batch. These are reviewed follow-up targets, not promoted severity evidence.

targets.currentAssessment: Partially covered: Diognosis has HLA-B risk-allele selectors including HLA-B*57:01 and warning-card behavior, but Open Targets context should remain non-scoring until the Diognosis evidence row is reviewed against label/CPIC-style sources.
targets.neededProductBehavior: Keep External Safety Context visible; verify existing HLA-B*57:01 warning card and create/confirm Diognosis-reviewed evidence for abacavir hypersensitivity before any promotion.
targets.evidenceTask: Verify Abacavir/HLA-B*57:01 label and PGx evidence, then decide whether current Diognosis warning card needs source or wording updates.

targets.currentAssessment: Largely covered: Diognosis has a CYP2C19 selector, clopidogrel active-thiol metabolite rule, and CPIC-style evidence references; Open Targets rows should be used to verify coverage, not to raise severity directly.
targets.neededProductBehavior: Keep External Safety Context visible; confirm the clopidogrel activation warning card and metabolite rule stay aligned with reviewed Diognosis sources.
targets.evidenceTask: Review Clopidogrel/CYP2C19 evidence references and decide whether any Open Targets ClinPGx wording adds missing context.

targets.currentAssessment: Largely covered: Diognosis has a DPYD selector, capecitabine-to-5-FU metabolite/toxicity rule, and fluoropyrimidine evidence references; Open Targets rows are a verification prompt.
targets.neededProductBehavior: Keep External Safety Context visible; confirm DPYD warning card and metabolite rule wording against reviewed Diognosis evidence.
targets.evidenceTask: Review Capecitabine/DPYD evidence and decide whether scenario copy or warning-card wording needs tightening.

targets.currentAssessment: Partially covered: Diognosis has CYP2C9 and VKORC1 selectors and a VKORC1 warfarin dose-sensitivity rule. CYP2C9 warfarin-specific coverage should be verified before any Open Targets context is promoted.
targets.neededProductBehavior: Keep External Safety Context visible; confirm warfarin dose-sensitivity behavior and whether CYP2C9-specific warning copy needs a reviewed Diognosis evidence task.
targets.evidenceTask: Review Warfarin/CYP2C9/VKORC1 evidence and decide whether to add or adjust a warfarin CYP2C9-specific warning card.

targets.currentAssessment: Largely covered: Diognosis has a CYP2D6 selector, codeine-to-morphine prodrug activation rule, and CPIC-style evidence references. Open Targets rows should be treated as verification context.
targets.neededProductBehavior: Keep External Safety Context visible; confirm codeine prodrug warning behavior for CYP2D6 poor and ultrarapid metabolizer states.
targets.evidenceTask: Review Codeine/CYP2D6 evidence and decide whether current prodrug activation wording needs source alignment.
